title: Component
description: The data model for a single component as stored in the KB. Backs each components/<level>/<Name>/index.md (frontmatter + variant-group list). Written by ds-write from the raw-extract cache; consumed by ds-validate and ds-refresh.

name.description: Raw Figma component name, verbatim. The folder is the slugified form of this.

category.description: Atomic level from atomic-classification-rules.md. _review when needs_human_review.

figma_component_id.description: Session node id of the component / component set (= raw-extract component.nodeId).

figma_component_set_id.description: Set id; null for a standalone COMPONENT.

figma_component_key.description: Stable published key — the anchor ds-refresh re-resolves against.

figma_link.description: Deep link to the node in the Figma file.

code_component_name.description: From Code Connect mapping; null when unmapped.

code_path.description: Source path of the code component; null when unmapped.

storybook_link.description: Story URL if configured; otherwise null.

uses_tokens.description: Deduped dotted token names bound anywhere in the component. [] when nothing is bound (raw-hex-only); flagged in the write report.

composed_in.description: Names of components that contain this one (parents in the composition graph). [] if top-level.

contains.description: Names of child components this one composes. [] for an atom.

similar_to.description: Not extractable from Figma; always [] from auto-extraction, human-filled later.

deprecated_by.description: null unless a deprecation name-prefix (🚫, Deprecated, Old, [deprecated]) was detected; then the replacement name(s) or ['removed'], flagged for human confirmation.

confidence.description: Computed during classification per confidence-levels.md. Must match the entry in index.json.

last_updated.description: Date the KB entry was generated (= meta.generatedAt date).

total_variants.description: Count of variants in the set (1 for a standalone COMPONENT).

variant_groups.description: One entry per variant axis. Each backs a variants/<group>.md (Tier 2) file.

options.description: Verbatim option values — never normalized (preserve deliberate missing spaces).

file.description: Relative path to the Tier 2 variant file, e.g. variants/hierarchy.md.
